lichess-puzzle-timer.title: Lichess Puzzle Timer Browser Extension
lichess-puzzle-timer.shortExcerpt: A browser extension that implements a timer to puzzles in lichess. Works on both Chrome and Firefox (and Firefox for Android).

arduino-embedded-foundations.title: Arduino Embedded Systems Foundations (10 Micro-Projects)
arduino-embedded-foundations.shortExcerpt: A structured set of 10 Arduino micro-projects designed to build strong fundamentals in embedded systems, focusing on logic, state machines, and sensor handling rather than simple step-by-step tutorials.

blog-core.title: Blog Core (Demo Blog App)
blog-core.shortExcerpt: A full-stack blog application featuring post creation, editing, deletion, and dynamic rendering — built as a demo project to explore modern web development workflows.
